title: SB 1120 protects patients from Artificial Intelligence by requiring health care providers to make the final decisions on what kind of treatments patients receive rather than AI
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

    "SB 1120 aims to safeguard patients' access to necessary medical treatments by requiring oversight when insurers use AI algorithms.",
raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 1120 mandates that health care providers make the final decisions on treatments rather than artificial intelligence.",
    "SB 1120 aims to safeguard patients' access to necessary medical treatments by requiring oversight when insurers use AI algorithms.",
    "AI can lead to erroneous or biased decisions on medical treatment due to its inability to fully understand a patient's medical history and needs.",
    "Health insurance plans have increasingly relied on AI to streamline the processing of claims and prior authorization requests in recent years.",
    "There are legitimate concerns about inaccuracies and biases in AI, prompting calls for oversight in its use within healthcare.",
    "Wrongful denial of insurance claims based on AI algorithms can lead to serious health consequences and even death.",
    "SB 1120 requires that any denial, delay, or modification of healthcare services based on medical necessity be made by a licensed physician or competent healthcare provider."
  ]
}
```
